meta.name: eval behavioral samples (converted from A pool)
meta.note: Deterministically converted from the eval A knowledge pool. A type X (worldview belief) -> belief/edit/weights; A type Y (personal fact about JQ) -> fact/rag. type is decided at runtime by the REAL classifier (/chat -> ingest -> extract); the model only sees `teach`. expect_type / expect_route / expect_source here are GATES (what should happen), NOT hints passed to the model.
meta.decode_wart: Belief answers may decode-degrade; a substring hit on the expected word still passes (substring semantics, same as the demo).

free_scenario_e2e.note: Free-form scenario probes validated through the real /chat endpoint with rag_off=true. Teach only the listed belief turns, run /consolidate background=true, then ask the probes. Expected source is the private scenario-memory lane, not RAG. Beliefs converted from the eval A pool.
